Page Setup

Complete documentation for page setup and print settings in Aspose.Cells FOSS for .NET

← Back to Index

Page Setup Overview

The PageSetup class controls how worksheets appear when printed, including page orientation, paper size, margins, headers, footers, and other print-related settings. Proper page setup ensures your spreadsheets print exactly as intended.

Key Page Setup Features:
  • Page orientation (portrait or landscape)
  • Paper size selection (Letter, A4, Legal, etc.)
  • Margin configuration (top, bottom, left, right, header, footer)
  • Header and footer customization
  • Print area specification
  • Print titles (repeat rows and columns)
  • Scaling and page order settings
  • Gridline and heading printing options

Page Orientation and Size

Page Orientation
var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;

// Set page orientation
pageSetup.Orientation = PageOrientationType.Portrait;   // Vertical (default)
pageSetup.Orientation = PageOrientationType.Landscape;  // Horizontal
Paper Size
var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;

// Set paper size
pageSetup.PaperSize = PaperSizeType.PaperLetter;     // 8.5" x 11" (default)
pageSetup.PaperSize = PaperSizeType.PaperA4;         // 210mm x 297mm
pageSetup.PaperSize = PaperSizeType.PaperLegal;       // 8.5" x 14"
pageSetup.PaperSize = PaperSizeType.PaperA3;         // 297mm x 420mm
pageSetup.PaperSize = PaperSizeType.PaperA5;         // 148mm x 210mm
pageSetup.PaperSize = PaperSizeType.PaperEnvelope10; // 4.125" x 9.5"
Custom Paper Size
// Set custom dimensions (in inches)
var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;
pageSetup.PaperSize = PaperSizeType.PaperLetter;  // Start with a standard size
pageSetup.PaperWidth = 11.5;  // inches
pageSetup.PaperHeight = 8.5;  // inches

Margins

Setting Margins
var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;

// Set margins in inches
pageSetup.LeftMargin = 0.75;    // 0.75 inch
pageSetup.RightMargin = 0.75;   // 0.75 inch
pageSetup.TopMargin = 1.0;      // 1.0 inch
pageSetup.BottomMargin = 1.0;   // 1.0 inch

// Set header and footer margins
pageSetup.HeaderMargin = 0.5;   // 0.5 inch
pageSetup.FooterMargin = 0.5;   // 0.5 inch
Narrow Margins
// Narrow margins for maximum content space
var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;
pageSetup.LeftMargin = 0.25;
pageSetup.RightMargin = 0.25;
pageSetup.TopMargin = 0.75;
pageSetup.BottomMargin = 0.75;
pageSetup.HeaderMargin = 0.3;
pageSetup.FooterMargin = 0.3;
Wide Margins
// Wide margins for documents with binding
var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;
pageSetup.LeftMargin = 1.5;    // Extra space for binding
pageSetup.RightMargin = 0.75;
pageSetup.TopMargin = 1.25;
pageSetup.BottomMargin = 1.25;
pageSetup.HeaderMargin = 0.75;
pageSetup.FooterMargin = 0.75;

Headers and Footers

Basic Header and Footer
var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;

// Set header text (left, center, right sections)
pageSetup.SetHeader(0, "Company Report");              // Left section
pageSetup.SetHeader(1, "&A");                          // Center: Sheet name
pageSetup.SetHeader(2, "&D");                          // Right: Date

// Set footer text (left, center, right sections)
pageSetup.SetFooter(0, "&P of &N");                    // Left: Page x of y
pageSetup.SetFooter(1, "Confidential");                // Center: Text
pageSetup.SetFooter(2, "&T");                          // Right: Time
Special Header/Footer Codes
// Common formatting codes:
&F   // File name
&A   // Sheet name
&D   // Date
&T   // Time
&P   // Page number
&N   // Total pages
&Z   // File path
&L   // Start left section
&C   // Start center section
&R   // Start right section
&"FontName,FontStyle" // Change font (e.g., &"Arial,Bold")
&nn  // Font size in points (e.g., &10)
&Kxx // Font color (RGB hex, e.g., &KFF0000 for red)
&B   // Bold on/off
&I   // Italic on/off
&U   // Underline on/off
&S   // Strikethrough on/off
&E   // Double underline on/off
&X   // Superscript on/off
&Y   // Subscript on/off

// Examples:
pageSetup.SetHeader(1, "&\"Arial,Bold\"&12&A");    // Bold 12pt Arial, sheet name
pageSetup.SetFooter(0, "Page &P of &N");          // Page x of y
pageSetup.SetFooter(1, "&D &T");                  // Date and time
pageSetup.SetFooter(2, "&F");                     // File name
Custom Header/Footer
// Create a professional header with logo placeholder
pageSetup.SetHeader(0, "[Logo]");
pageSetup.SetHeader(1, "&\"Times New Roman,Bold\"&14Quarterly Report");
pageSetup.SetHeader(2, "&\"Arial\"&10Prepared by: John Doe");

// Create a comprehensive footer
pageSetup.SetFooter(0, "&\"Arial\"&10&D &T");                    // Date and time
pageSetup.SetFooter(1, "&\"Arial\"&10Confidential - Internal Use Only");  // Center notice
pageSetup.SetFooter(2, "&\"Arial\"&10Page &P of &N");           // Page numbers

// Different headers for first page
pageSetup.DifferentFirst = true;
pageSetup.SetHeader(0, "");           // First page: no left header
pageSetup.SetHeader(1, "Cover Page"); // First page: cover title
pageSetup.SetHeader(2, "");           // First page: no right header
Odd and Even Pages
// Different headers/footers for odd and even pages
pageSetup.DifferentOddEven = true;

// Odd page header
pageSetup.SetHeader(0, "Odd Page Left");
pageSetup.SetHeader(1, "Odd Page Center");
pageSetup.SetHeader(2, "Odd Page Right");

// Even page header
pageSetup.SetHeader(0, "Even Page Left");
pageSetup.SetHeader(1, "Even Page Center");
pageSetup.SetHeader(2, "Even Page Right");

Print Area

Set Print Area
var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;

// Set print area to specific range
pageSetup.PrintArea = "A1:F20";
pageSetup.PrintArea = "Sheet1!A1:F20";

// Set print area using cell references
pageSetup.PrintArea = "$A$1:$G$30";

// Clear print area (print entire sheet)
pageSetup.PrintArea = string.Empty;
Multiple Print Areas
// Set multiple non-contiguous print areas (comma-separated)
pageSetup.PrintArea = "A1:F10,A15:F25,A30:F40";

// Print specific columns only
pageSetup.PrintArea = "A:C";

Print Titles

Repeat Rows (Header Rows)
var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;

// Repeat top rows on every page
pageSetup.PrintTitleRows = "$1:$1";           // Repeat row 1
pageSetup.PrintTitleRows = "$1:$2";           // Repeat rows 1-2
pageSetup.PrintTitleRows = "$1:$3";           // Repeat rows 1-3
Repeat Columns
var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;

// Repeat left columns on every page
pageSetup.PrintTitleColumns = "$A:$A";        // Repeat column A
pageSetup.PrintTitleColumns = "$A:$B";        // Repeat columns A-B
pageSetup.PrintTitleColumns = "$A:$C";        // Repeat columns A-C
Combine Rows and Columns
// Repeat both header rows and left columns
var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;
pageSetup.PrintTitleRows = "$1:$2";     // Repeat header rows
pageSetup.PrintTitleColumns = "$A:$B";  // Repeat left columns

Scaling and Page Order

Fit to Page
var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;

// Fit to specific number of pages
pageSetup.FitToPagesWide = 1;    // Fit width to 1 page
pageSetup.FitToPagesTall = 0;    // Auto for height (0 = auto)

pageSetup.FitToPagesWide = 0;     // Auto for width
pageSetup.FitToPagesTall = 2;     // Fit height to 2 pages

// Fit to both dimensions
pageSetup.FitToPagesWide = 1;
pageSetup.FitToPagesTall = 1;     // Fit entire sheet on one page
Scaling Percentage
// Set scaling percentage (10-400%)
var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;
pageSetup.Zoom = 100;    // Normal size (100%)
pageSetup.Zoom = 75;     // 75% of normal size
pageSetup.Zoom = 150;    // 150% of normal size
Page Order
var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;

// Set page order for multi-page printing
pageSetup.Order = PrintOrderType.DownThenOver;  // Down columns, then across rows
pageSetup.Order = PrintOrderType.OverThenDown;  // Across rows, then down columns

Print Options

Gridlines and Headings
var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;

// Print gridlines
pageSetup.PrintGridlines = true;
pageSetup.PrintGridlines = false;

// Print row and column headings
pageSetup.PrintHeadings = true;
pageSetup.PrintHeadings = false;
Black and White
var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;

// Print in black and white (ignore colors)
pageSetup.BlackAndWhite = true;
pageSetup.BlackAndWhite = false;
Draft Quality
var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;

// Print in draft quality (faster, lower quality)
pageSetup.IsDraft = true;
pageSetup.IsDraft = false;
Comments
var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;

// Print comments
// Options: PrintInPlace, PrintSheetEnd, None
pageSetup.PrintComments = PrintCommentsType.PrintInPlace;
pageSetup.PrintComments = PrintCommentsType.PrintSheetEnd;
pageSetup.PrintComments = PrintCommentsType.None;
Center on Page
var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;

// Center horizontally
pageSetup.CenterHorizontally = true;
pageSetup.CenterHorizontally = false;

// Center vertically
pageSetup.CenterVertically = true;
pageSetup.CenterVertically = false;

Complete Example

Professional Report Setup
using Aspose.Cells_FOSS;
using System;

class Program
{
    static void Main()
    {
        var workbook = new Workbook();
        var worksheet = workbook.Worksheets[0];
        var cells = worksheet.Cells;

        // Add sample data
        cells["A1"].PutValue("Sales Report");
        cells["A3"].PutValue("Region");
        cells["B3"].PutValue("Q1");
        cells["C3"].PutValue("Q2");
        cells["D3"].PutValue("Q3");
        cells["E3"].PutValue("Q4");
        cells["F3"].PutValue("Total");

        cells["A4"].PutValue("North");
        cells["B4"].PutValue(120000);
        cells["C4"].PutValue(135000);
        cells["D4"].PutValue(142000);
        cells["E4"].PutValue(150000);
        cells["F4"].Formula = "=SUM(B4:E4)";

        cells["A5"].PutValue("South");
        cells["B5"].PutValue(98000);
        cells["C5"].PutValue(112000);
        cells["D5"].PutValue(125000);
        cells["E5"].PutValue(138000);
        cells["F5"].Formula = "=SUM(B5:E5)";

        cells["A6"].PutValue("East");
        cells["B6"].PutValue(145000);
        cells["C6"].PutValue(158000);
        cells["D6"].PutValue(165000);
        cells["E6"].PutValue(172000);
        cells["F6"].Formula = "=SUM(B6:E6)";

        cells["A7"].PutValue("West");
        cells["B7"].PutValue(89000);
        cells["C7"].PutValue(95000);
        cells["D7"].PutValue(102000);
        cells["E7"].PutValue(110000);
        cells["F7"].Formula = "=SUM(B7:E7)";

        // Configure page setup
        var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;

        // Page orientation and size
        pageSetup.Orientation = PageOrientationType.Landscape;
        pageSetup.PaperSize = PaperSizeType.PaperLetter;

        // Margins
        pageSetup.LeftMargin = 0.75;
        pageSetup.RightMargin = 0.75;
        pageSetup.TopMargin = 1.0;
        pageSetup.BottomMargin = 1.0;
        pageSetup.HeaderMargin = 0.5;
        pageSetup.FooterMargin = 0.5;

        // Headers
        pageSetup.SetHeader(0, "&\"Arial,Bold\"&10ABC Corporation");
        pageSetup.SetHeader(1, "&\"Times New Roman,Bold\"&16Quarterly Sales Report");
        pageSetup.SetHeader(2, "&D");

        // Footers
        pageSetup.SetFooter(0, "&\"Arial\"&10&F");
        pageSetup.SetFooter(1, "Confidential - Internal Use Only");
        pageSetup.SetFooter(2, "&\"Arial\"&10Page &P of &N");

        // Print area
        pageSetup.PrintArea = "A1:F7";

        // Print titles
        pageSetup.PrintTitleRows = "$3:$3";  // Repeat header row
        pageSetup.PrintTitleColumns = "$A:$A";  // Repeat first column

        // Center on page
        pageSetup.CenterHorizontally = true;
        pageSetup.CenterVertically = true;

        // Print options
        pageSetup.PrintGridlines = false;
        pageSetup.PrintHeadings = false;
        pageSetup.BlackAndWhite = false;

        // Fit to page
        pageSetup.FitToPagesWide = 1;
        pageSetup.FitToPagesTall = 0;

        // Apply styling
        var titleStyle = cells["A1"].GetStyle();
        titleStyle.Font.Bold = true;
        titleStyle.Font.Size = 18;
        titleStyle.Font.Color = System.Drawing.Color.White;
        titleStyle.BackgroundColor = System.Drawing.Color.FromArgb(0, 51, 153);
        cells["A1"].SetStyle(titleStyle);

        var headerStyle = workbook.CreateStyle();
        headerStyle.Font.Bold = true;
        headerStyle.Font.Color = System.Drawing.Color.White;
        headerStyle.BackgroundColor = System.Drawing.Color.FromArgb(0, 102, 204);
        for (int col = 0; col <= 5; col++)
        {
            cells[2, col].SetStyle(headerStyle);
        }

        var currencyStyle = workbook.CreateStyle();
        currencyStyle.NumberFormat = "$#,##0";
        for (int row = 3; row <= 6; row++)
        {
            for (int col = 1; col <= 5; col++)
            {
                cells[row, col].SetStyle(currencyStyle);
            }
        }

        // Auto-fit columns
        worksheet.AutoFitColumns();

        workbook.Save("sales-report.xlsx");
        Console.WriteLine("Sales report with professional page setup created!");
    }
}
Invoice Template
using Aspose.Cells_FOSS;
using System;

class Program
{
    static void Main()
    {
        var workbook = new Workbook();
        var worksheet = workbook.Worksheets[0];
        var cells = worksheet.Cells;

        // Set up invoice structure
        cells["A1"].PutValue("INVOICE");
        cells["A3"].PutValue("Invoice #");
        cells["B3"].PutValue("INV-2026-001");
        cells["A4"].PutValue("Date");
        cells["B4"].PutValue(DateTime.Now.ToShortDateString());
        cells["A6"].PutValue("Bill To:");
        cells["A7"].PutValue("John Doe");
        cells["A8"].PutValue("123 Main Street");
        cells["A9"].PutValue("City, State 12345");

        cells["A12"].PutValue("Description");
        cells["B12"].PutValue("Quantity");
        cells["C12"].PutValue("Unit Price");
        cells["D12"].PutValue("Total");

        // Add line items
        string[] items = { "Product A", "Product B", "Product C", "Product D" };
        int[] quantities = { 5, 10, 3, 7 };
        double[] prices = { 25.00, 18.50, 42.00, 15.75 };

        for (int i = 0; i < items.Length; i++)
        {
            int row = i + 13;
            cells[row, 0].PutValue(items[i]);
            cells[row, 1].PutValue(quantities[i]);
            cells[row, 2].PutValue(prices[i]);
            cells[row, 3].Formula = $"=B{row}*C{row}";
        }

        // Add totals
        int totalRow = items.Length + 14;
        cells[totalRow, 2].PutValue("Subtotal:");
        cells[totalRow, 3].Formula = $"=SUM(D13:D{totalRow - 1})";

        totalRow++;
        cells[totalRow, 2].PutValue("Tax (8%):");
        cells[totalRow, 3].Formula = $"=D{totalRow - 1}*0.08";

        totalRow++;
        cells[totalRow, 2].PutValue("Total:");
        cells[totalRow, 3].Formula = $"=D{totalRow - 2}+D{totalRow - 1}";

        // Page setup
        var pageSetup = worksheet.PageSetup;

        // Portrait for standard invoices
        pageSetup.Orientation = PageOrientationType.Portrait;
        pageSetup.PaperSize = PaperSizeType.PaperLetter;

        // Narrow margins for invoices
        pageSetup.LeftMargin = 0.5;
        pageSetup.RightMargin = 0.5;
        pageSetup.TopMargin = 0.75;
        pageSetup.BottomMargin = 0.75;
        pageSetup.HeaderMargin = 0.3;
        pageSetup.FooterMargin = 0.3;

        // Invoice header
        pageSetup.SetHeader(1, "&\"Arial,Bold\"&14Invoice # &F");

        // Invoice footer
        pageSetup.SetFooter(0, "Thank you for your business!");
        pageSetup.SetFooter(1, "Payment due within 30 days");
        pageSetup.SetFooter(2, "&D");

        // Print area
        pageSetup.PrintArea = "A1:D20";

        // Print titles (header row)
        pageSetup.PrintTitleRows = "$12:$12";

        // Center on page
        pageSetup.CenterHorizontally = true;

        // Apply styling
        var titleStyle = cells["A1"].GetStyle();
        titleStyle.Font.Bold = true;
        titleStyle.Font.Size = 20;
        titleStyle.Font.Color = System.Drawing.Color.White;
        titleStyle.BackgroundColor = System.Drawing.Color.FromArgb(0, 51, 153);
        cells["A1"].SetStyle(titleStyle);

        var headerStyle = workbook.CreateStyle();
        headerStyle.Font.Bold = true;
        headerStyle.Font.Color = System.Drawing.Color.White;
        headerStyle.BackgroundColor = System.Drawing.Color.FromArgb(0, 102, 204);
        for (int col = 0; col <= 3; col++)
        {
            cells[11, col].SetStyle(headerStyle);
        }

        var currencyStyle = workbook.CreateStyle();
        currencyStyle.NumberFormat = "$#,##0.00";
        for (int row = 13; row <= items.Length + 12; row++)
        {
            cells[row, 2].SetStyle(currencyStyle);
            cells[row, 3].SetStyle(currencyStyle);
        }

        for (int row = items.Length + 14; row <= items.Length + 16; row++)
        {
            cells[row, 2].SetStyle(currencyStyle);
            cells[row, 3].SetStyle(currencyStyle);
        }

        // Auto-fit columns
        worksheet.AutoFitColumns();

        workbook.Save("invoice-template.xlsx");
        Console.WriteLine("Invoice template with page setup created!");
    }
}

Important Notes

  • Margin Units: All margins are specified in inches.
  • Header/Footer Sections: Use 0, 1, and 2 for left, center, and right sections respectively.
  • Print Area: Use A1 notation or absolute cell references.
  • Fitting Content: Use FitToPagesWide and FitToPagesTall for automatic scaling.
  • Print Preview: Always test print settings in Excel to ensure desired output.
  • First Page Options: Use DifferentFirst to customize headers/footers for the first page.
  • Scaling: Scaling percentage must be between 10 and 400 percent.

Related Documentation
